message: I've been reading through the Red Cross hurricane prep guide, and honestly it's one of those resources that makes you feel way less overwhelmed—they break everything down into actual doable steps instead of just saying "be prepared" and leaving you hanging. The nice thing is knowing what to focus on *before* storm season even starts, which takes a lot of the last-minute scrambling out of the equation. What's one thing on your prep list that you've already tackled, or are you still in the thinking-about-it phase?
